overall.description: First-person exploration through a post-apocalyptic wasteland during an orange dust storm, approaching and entering an abandoned industrial warehouse. The footage exhibits high-end game engine graphics with atmospheric volumetric lighting and dense particle effects characteristic of Cyberpunk 2077.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the dust storm toward distant industrial structures on the horizon

entered.detail: desert vegetation scattered across the wasteland landscape
tall building silhouettes barely visible through the orange dust clouds
sandy desert terrain with sparse grass patches
thick atmospheric dust creating an orange-tinted sky

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide desert wasteland engulfed in an orange dust storm. Sparse yucca bushes dot the sandy terrain while distant skyscrapers loom as faint silhouettes through the haze. The camera moves steadily forward through the exposed environment with very low visibility.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial compound perimeter with security fencing

events.description: approaching the modern industrial warehouse through the perimeter fence line
passing through the security gate, artificial floodlights from the building become prominent

agents.ego_description: approaching the warehouse entrance through the compound fence, moving toward the illuminated building

entered.detail: tall security fence with vertical bars surrounding the compound
large industrial structure with illuminated windows and exterior lighting
bright artificial lights mounted on the building facade cutting through the dust
derelict trucks and cars parked near the warehouse entrance

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to the industrial compound perimeter as the camera approaches the warehouse through a metal security fence. Abandoned vehicles sit near the entrance while bright floodlights on the building pierce through the orange dust. The environment becomes partially sheltered as the camera moves through the gate toward the entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned industrial warehouse interior with machinery and debris

events.description: entering the warehouse from the dust storm, transitioning to enclosed interior space
moving deeper into the warehouse, ambient light dims and warm artificial sources dominate

agents.ego_description: navigating through the cluttered warehouse interior past industrial machinery and debris

entered.detail: large open industrial space with high ceilings and exposed beams
large equipment and engine parts scattered throughout the floor
blue and red industrial drums and containers
walls with colorful spray paint and tags
metal barrel with fire providing warm flickering light
large industrial ductwork running along the ceiling

segments.scene_description: The camera enters the warehouse interior, leaving the dust storm behind. The space is filled with abandoned industrial machinery, metal barrels, and graffiti-covered walls. Overhead pipes run along the ceiling while a burning trash barrel provides warm flickering light. The camera explores deeper into the dimly lit warehouse, navigating through debris and industrial equipment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a desolate, storm-swept wasteland into the sheltered depths of an abandoned industrial warehouse. It begins by pushing forward through a wide desert engulfed in an orange dust storm, where sparse yucca bushes and the faint silhouettes of distant skyscrapers are barely visible through the haze. As the camera approaches the perimeter of an industrial compound, the open terrain gives way to a metal security fence and abandoned vehicles, while bright floodlights begin to pierce through the thick dust. The scene then shifts as the camera passes through the gate and enters the warehouse interior, leaving the storm behind for a dimly lit space filled with industrial machinery, graffiti-covered walls, and overhead pipes. Finally, the movement explores deeper into the debris-strewn hall, guided by the warm, flickering light of a burning trash barrel.
